comment: Win/lose rules surfaced in casino UI and /api/casino/guides

coin_flip.lose: Pick does not match — you lose the full stake.
coin_flip.payout: Stake × payout_multiplier (~1.9×) on win; 0 on loss.
coin_flip.tip: Fair 50/50 — house edge comes from sub-2× payout.

dice.win: Your guess (1–6) matches the rolled die.
dice.tip: True odds 1/6; only bet when multiplier justifies risk.

crash.win: Cash out before the rocket crashes; payout = stake × multiplier at cashout.
crash.lose: Crash before you cash out — lose full stake.
crash.payout: Multiplier rises until random crash point (provably fair).
crash.tip: Lower auto-cashout = safer; chasing 10×+ often busts.

mines.win: Reveal safe tiles and cash out; each safe tile raises multiplier.
mines.lose: Hit a mine — lose stake (unless insured by cashout before).
mines.payout: Multiplier grows with safe reveals; cash out anytime.
mines.tip: More mines = higher risk/reward per tile.

plinko.win: Ball lands in a bucket with multiplier > 0.
plinko.lose: Bucket multiplier 0 or below stake (net loss).
plinko.payout: Risk table sets bucket weights — high risk = rare huge hits.
plinko.tip: Medium risk balances variance; high risk is lottery-style.

wheel.win: Wheel stops on segment with multiplier ≥ 1 (or any win segment).
wheel.tip: High risk has many zero slices.

slot_classic.win: Payline matches paytable (2–3 symbols, scatters, wilds).
slot_classic.payout: See in-game paytable; jackpot symbol may hit progressive pool.
slot_classic.tip: Higher bet unlocks bigger line wins, not better odds.

battle_outcome.win: Your prediction matches sampled live battle outcome distribution.
battle_outcome.payout: Varies by outcome rarity (win/draw/loss) from telemetry.
battle_outcome.tip: Check prognosis API before betting — meta shifts with fleet activity.

rps_distribution.win: Predict the next dominant RPS move in battle meta.
rps_distribution.lose: Actual distribution pick differs from yours.

scratch_card.win: Match 2 or 3 symbols on the revealed card.
scratch_card.tip: Fixed odds per card — pure variance.

mines.win: Reveal safe tiles and cash out before hitting a mine.
mines.lose: Click a mine — lose entire stake.
mines.payout: Multiplier increases per safe tile; cash out anytime.
mines.tip: Fewer mines = safer grid; greed often wipes gains.

wheel.win: Wheel stops on a segment with payout ≥ your stake.
wheel.lose: Zero or sub-1× segment — net loss.
wheel.tip: High risk has more zero slices.

keno.win: Enough of your picked numbers are drawn.
keno.tip: More spots = harder to hit but bigger top prizes.

hilo.win: Correctly predict higher/lower through the card chain.
hilo.lose: Wrong guess ends the run — lose stake.
hilo.payout: Multiplier stacks per correct step; cash out between cards.
hilo.tip: Cash out early on weak cards.

roulette.win: Ball lands on your number/color/bet type.
roulette.lose: Ball misses your bet — lose stake.
roulette.tip: Outside bets survive longer; inside bets spike variance.

rps_bet.win: Your rock/paper/scissors beats the house pick.
rps_bet.lose: House wins or ties (per rules) — lose or push.

rps_counter_pick.win: Your counter move beats the sampled meta opener.
rps_counter_pick.lose: House move beats yours — lose stake.
rps_counter_pick.tip: Use prognosis counter-pick hint before betting.
